pre_mission.speaker: Elderly Villager
pre_mission.line: Our scouts vanished near marked trees. We found this.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: Too neat for bandits. Too deliberate for beasts.

pre_mission.speaker: Aric
pre_mission.line: Then whoever is behind this wants to be mistaken for chaos.

pre_mission.speaker: Lyria
pre_mission.line: And we are about to ruin that disguise.

battle_start.speaker: Aric
battle_start.line: Protect the civilians. Break the herd pattern.

battle_start.speaker: Lyria
battle_start.line: And if anyone has complaints, they can file them with my magic.

post_mission.speaker: Aric
post_mission.line: Missing scouts. Marked routes. Coordinated attacks.

post_mission.speaker: Lyria
post_mission.line: I would prefer monsters. People choose this.

post_mission.speaker: Aric
post_mission.line: Then we find the person who chose it first.
